narrative:
Maplewood Local Sd (Trumbull) school district has 3,481 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
